mapper.sql: id, org_name, org_id, building_name, building_id, building_code, room_num, room_code, station_name, station_id, substation_name, substation_id, house_id, unit_id, unit_code, unit_site, floor, nfloor_area, gfloor_area, heating_area, establish_time, nature, site_type, user_id, exist_user_id, user_name, phone, id_no, account, item_name, standard_id, standard_name, standard_price, pay_status, other_code, create_by, create_time, type
mapper.insert:
insert into pr_import_basic_data (org_name, building_name, room_num, unit_code, floor, nfloor_area, gfloor_area, establish_time, user_id, user_name, phone, id_no, account, create_by, create_time, building_code, room_code, station_name, substation_name, heating_area, site_type, station_type, unit_site, nature, item_name, standard_name, standard_price, pay_status, other_code) values
(trim(#{item.orgName}), trim(#{item.buildingName}), trim(#{item.roomNum}), trim(#{item.unitCode}), trim(#{item.floor}), trim(#{item.nfloorArea}), trim(#{item.gfloorArea}), trim(#{item.establishTime}), #{item.userId}, trim(#{item.userName}), trim(#{item.phone}), trim(#{item.idNo}), #{item.account}, #{item.createBy}, #{item.createTime}, trim(#{item.buildingCode}), trim(#{item.roomCode}), trim(#{item.stationName}), trim(#{item.substationName}), trim(#{item.heatingArea}), trim(#{item.siteType}), trim(#{item.stationType}), trim(#{item.unitSite}), trim(#{item.nature}), trim(#{item.itemName}), trim(#{item.standardName}), trim(#{item.standardPrice}), trim(#{item.payStatus}), trim(#{item.otherCode}))
mapper.update: update pr_import_basic_data a left join sys_organization b on a.org_name = b.name set a.org_id = b.id where a.create_by = #{create} and a.type = '0' and a.org_name = b.name

update pr_import_basic_data a left join pr_building b on a.org_id = b.org_id and a.building_name = b.name set a.building_id = b.id where a.create_by = #{create} and a.type = '0' and a.org_id = b.org_id and a.building_name = b.name

update pr_import_basic_data a left join pr_unit b on a.org_id = b.org_id and a.building_id = b.building_id set a.unit_id = b.id where a.create_by = #{create} and a.type = '0' and b.del_flag = '0' and a.org_id = b.org_id and a.building_id = b.building_id and a.unit_code = b.name
update pr_import_basic_data a left join pr_heat_station b on a.org_id = b.org_id and a.station_name = b.name set a.station_id = b.id where a.create_by = #{create} and a.type = '0'

update pr_import_basic_data a left join pr_heat_station_partition b on a.station_id = b.station_id and a.substation_name = b.name set a.substation_id = b.id where a.create_by = #{create} and a.type = '0'
update pr_import_basic_data a left join pr_house b on a.org_id = b.org_id and a.room_num = b.room_num set a.house_id = b.id where a.create_by = #{create} and a.type = '0'

update pr_import_basic_data a left join pr_standard b on a.standard_name = b.name and a.standard_price = b.standard_price set a.standard_id = b.id where a.create_by = #{create} and a.type = '0' and length(a.standard_name) > 0
mapper.select: select from pr_import_basic_data where create_by = #{create} and type = '0' and (org_id is null or org_id = '') limit 500
select from pr_import_basic_data where create_by = #{create} and type = '0' and (room_num is null or room_num = '') limit 500
select * from pr_import_basic_data where create_by = #{create} and type = '0' and establish_time is null limit 500

select a.* from pr_import_basic_data a left join pr_house b on a.org_id = b.org_id and a.room_num = b.room_num where a.create_by = #{create} and a.type = '0' and a.org_id = b.org_id and a.room_num = b.room_num and b.del_flag = '0' limit 500
select from pr_import_basic_data where create_by = #{create} and type = '0' and (building_id is null or building_id = '')
select from pr_import_basic_data where create_by = #{create} and type = '0' and (unit_id is null or unit_id = '')
select from pr_import_basic_data where create_by = #{create} and type = '0' and (station_id is null or station_id = '')
select from pr_import_basic_data where create_by = #{create} and type = '0' and (substation_id is null or substation_id = '')
select from pr_import_basic_data where create_by = #{create} and type = '0' and standard_id is null and length(standard_name) > 0
mapper.delete: delete from pr_import_basic_data where create_by = #{create} and type = '0'
mapper.insert: insert into pr_house (id, room_num, building_id, building_name, org_id, org_name, create_by, establish_time, unit_code, floor, nfloor_area, gfloor_area, heating_area, site_type, station_type, nature, other_code, status) select house_id, room_num, building_id, building_name, org_id, org_name, create_by, establish_time, unit_code, floor, nfloor_area, gfloor_area, heating_area, site_type, substation_id, nature, other_code, case when phone is not null and phone != '' then '8' else '7' end from pr_import_basic_data where create_by = #{create} and type = '0'
mapper.select: select distinct org_id from pr_import_basic_data where create_by = #{create} and type = '0'
mapper.insert: insert into pr_user (id, name, phone, id_type, id_no, password, org_id, create_by, create_time) select user_id, user_name, phone, '1', id_no, #{password}, org_id, #{create}, now() from pr_import_basic_data where create_by = #{create} and type = '0' and user_id is not null and user_id not in (select id from pr_user) group by user_id

insert into pr_user_house (id, user_id, house_id) select CAST(CONV(SUBSTRING(REPLACE(UUID(), '-', ''), 18, 14), 16, 10) AS SIGNED), user_id, house_id from pr_import_basic_data where create_by = #{create} and type = '0' and user_id is not null and house_id is not null

insert into pr_house_change (id, house_id, org_id, user_id, change_type, create_time) select CAST(CONV(SUBSTRING(REPLACE(UUID(), '-', ''), 18, 14), 16, 10) AS SIGNED), house_id, org_id, user_id, '0', now() from pr_import_basic_data where create_by = #{create} and type = '0' and user_id is not null

insert into pr_house_expense (id, house_id, standard_id, create_by, create_time) select CAST(CONV(SUBSTRING(REPLACE(UUID(), '-', ''), 18, 14), 16, 10) AS SIGNED), house_id, standard_id, create_by, now() from pr_import_basic_data where create_by = #{create} and type = '0' and standard_id is not null

insert into pr_user (id, name, phone, id_type, id_no, password, org_id, create_by, create_time) values (#{user.id}, #{user.name}, #{user.phone}, #{user.idType}, #{user.idNo}, #{user.password}, #{user.orgId}, #{user.createBy}, #{user.createTime})
